case_title: JOHN MILLER VS. DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY MILLER, JOHN DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. PLAINTIFF JOHN MILLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DENNIS CHANG (PRESIDENT). SUBPOENAED RECORDS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, JOHN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED AUG-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,900.00 FILED BY MILLER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS RECEIVED <VIA MAIL>. (SUBPOENA ISSUED: AUG-03-2023 - TO: CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR) (FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 TO BE PLACED WITH DOCKET.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DENNIS CHANG (PRESIDENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT DENNIS AUTO REPAIR, LLC
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED HEARING DATE OCT-03-2023 AT 3:30PM.; RETURNED WITHOUT ORIGNAL SEALED SUBPOENA [ISSUED AUG-03-23]
